zh.Grandmesnil, Basse-Normandie, France: 法國巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯格藍德斯尼爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Rohais Grandmesnil於大約1072年出生在法國巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯格藍德斯尼爾時，她的父親Hugh de Grandmesnil41歲，母親Adeliza Beaumont34歲。她於大約1092年與Robert de Courcy在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾萊希斯特結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1127年在英國奧可福爾努聶哈姆 庫尼享年56歲。

nameMeanings.name: Rohais
meanings: A baptismal name derived, like the surname Rous, Rouse, Rowse, from Old French rous, red; from Latin rufus.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Rohais Grandmesnil was born about 1072, in Grandmesnil, Calvados, Lower Normandy, France, her father, Hugh de Grandmesnil, was 41 and her mother, Adeliza Beaumont, was 34. She married Robert de Courcy about 1092, in Leicester, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1127, in Nuneham Courtenay, Oxfordshire, England, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rohais Grandmesnil est née environ 1072, à Grandmesnil, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, France, son père, Hugh de Grandmesnil, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Adeliza Beaumont, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Robert de Courcy environ 1092, à Leicester, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1127, à Nuneham Courtenay, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rohais Grandmesnil è nata il circa 1072 nel Grandmesnil, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Hugh de Grandmesnil, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Adeliza Beaumont, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato Robert de Courcy circa 1092, nel Leicester, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1127, nel Nuneham Courtenay, Oxfordshire, England, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Rohais Grandmesnilが約1072年にフランスバセ-ノーマンディカルヴァドスグランドメスニルで生まれた時，父Hugh de Grandmesnilは41歳，母Adeliza Beaumontは34歳であった。約1092年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアレアイセスターでRobert de Courcyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1127年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアヌネハム コウルテナイで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Rohais Grandmesnil(이)가 대략 1072년 프랑스 배세-노먼디 캘바도스 그랜드메스니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh de Grandmesnil(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adeliza Beaumont(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 대략 1092년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 레이스스터에서 Robert de Courcy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1127년 영국 스퍼드실르 누니함 쿠르텐아이에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rohais Grandmesnil nasceu aproximadamente 1072, em Grandmesnil, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, França, seu pai, Hugh de Grandmesnil, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Adeliza Beaumont, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert de Courcy aproximadamente 1092, em Leicester, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1127, em Nuneham Courtenay, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rohais Grandmesnil родилась около 1072 г. в местности грандмеснил, калвадос, бассе-норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Hugh de Grandmesnil было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Adeliza Beaumont, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Courcy около 1092 г. в местности лисестир, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1127 г. в местности нунэам коуртенеи, оксфордшир, Англия в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rohais Grandmesnil nació aproximadamente 1072, en Grandmesnil, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Hugh de Grandmesnil, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Adeliza Beaumont, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Robert de Courcy aproximadamente 1092, en Leicester, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1127, en Nuneham Courtenay, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 56 años.
